q1_sink_dangerous.evidence: Sink is Jinja2 Template.render, which is in-memory string processing with no network I/O, shell execution, or irreversible side effects.

q2_observable_after_return.evidence: The rendered (unescaped) body is wrapped in HTMLResponse(body) and returned, so the XSS violation is present in the return value.

q3_result_in_memory.evidence: returns.kind is 'value' with expr 'HTMLResponse(body)', meaning the rendered output is directly accessible from the return value in memory.
